benefits.description: 1mg per week is sweet spot to kill off hunger while allowing for protein intake
16 week Tirzepatide protocol followed by 4 week drawdown achieved goal weight

side_effects.description: lost some muscle mass during 16 week Tirzepatide protocol

protocol_notes: Wife ran 1mg Tirzepatide per week with good results. User ran 16 week Tirzepatide protocol with 4 week drawdown before switching to Retatrutide. User notes muscle loss during Tirzepatide and hoping to preserve muscle better with Retatrutide. User's wife found 1mg/week to be sweet spot dose.
